live-provider-anthropic-oauth.description: anthropic provider live run needs Claude Max OAuth in the macOS keychain (useClaudeOauth:true, no API key). Required only when AGENT_MCP_LIVE=1 enables the anthropic matrix case; absent => that provider case skips (not fails).
live-provider-anthropic-oauth.how_to_provide: Sign in to Claude Code so the OAuth token is in the login keychain (Claude Max); or export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Then set AGENT_MCP_LIVE=1.

live-provider-claudecli.description: claudecli provider live run needs the 'claude' CLI installed and authenticated (drives stream-json; config {claudePath,model}). Required only for the claudecli matrix case under AGENT_MCP_LIVE=1; absent => that case skips (not fails). Also the default real provider for dod.5's run step.
live-provider-claudecli.how_to_provide: Install the Claude Code CLI (npm i -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code or equivalent) and ensure 'claude' is on PATH and logged in. Set CLAUDE_CLI_PATH if non-standard.

live-provider-lmstudio.description: lmstudio provider live run needs a running LM Studio OpenAI-compatible server reachable at LMSTUDIO_BASE_URL (config {model,baseURL}). Required only for the lmstudio matrix case under AGENT_MCP_LIVE=1; absent => that case skips (not fails).
live-provider-lmstudio.how_to_provide: Start LM Studio's local server with a model loaded; export LMSTUDIO_BASE_URL (e.g. http://localhost:1234/v1). Set AGENT_MCP_LIVE=1.
